sessions.title: The Ides Misalignment and Its Remedies
sessions.summary: The session was convened by Hugh, who observed that the Treaty of Bangor was ratified on the 14th of March rather than the 15th, forfeiting a calendrically symbolic alignment with the Ides of March...

sessions.title: Demonstration Session — Embroidery as Subject
sessions.summary: The first formal session of the Bangor Roundtable. Three parties examined the history, technique, and cultural significance of embroidery — approaching it respectively as economics and semiotics, global craft taxonomy, and applied engineering. No conclusions sought; the session was demonstrative in purpose.
